base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of link_walk_4dir — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Basic movement — 4 directions (down/up/left/right) × 2-frame walk cycle (alternating foot). Canonical NES top-down character set. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Basic movement — 4 directions (down/up/left/right) × 2-frame walk cycle (alternating foot). Canonical NES top-down character set; green tunic, orange hair
